title: PinResult
description: POST /pin?path=<abs> and POST /unpin?path=<abs>. Grounded in origin/main (PinResult struct bridge/cbridge.go:1942; handlePinHTTP :2170; handleUnpinHTTP :2182). A fresh /pin walks asynchronously and returns scanning=true with files_pinned/bytes_total=0 — real counts land via /cache-status. /unpin returns files_pinned = count removed, bytes_total=0, scanning=false.

files_pinned.description: On /pin: files pinned so far (0 while scanning). On /unpin: files removed.

bytes_total.description: Total bytes across pinned files (0 for /unpin, 0 while a /pin is still scanning).

error.description: Present (and ok=false) on a JSON failure response. NOTE: the missing-?path case returns HTTP 400 with a text/plain body 'missing ?path', not this JSON shape.

scanning.description: ALWAYS present (deliberately not omitempty — Swift required-decode would throw on absence). true = the pin walk is still in progress and counts are not yet final; poll /cache-status for progress.
